title: lathyrus bolanderi var. tracyi
intro: Lathyrus bolanderi var. tracyi, also known as Tracy's peavine or Tracy's sweet pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus bolanderi var. tracyi is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
